script: TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh); for ID in '2c4a8184-13db-4d42-a65e-5def7414ce2c|Jesus R Claude' 'ee80c194-7458-488f-bd68-60c0611daf82|Cameron Claude' '2055981c-eb41-4060-9ea3-c4f5d6e24792|Ashley Claude'; do CAT=$(echo $ID | cut -d'|' -f1); NAME=$(echo $ID | cut -d'|' -f2); CODE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$CAT" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"); if [ "$CODE" = "404" ]; then echo "  $NAME: GONE (404 — private to user only)"; elif [ "$CODE" = "200" ]; then echo "  $NAME: still in catalog (HTTP 200) — needs delete"; else echo "  $NAME: HTTP $CODE"; fi; done
